---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, Windows 11, macOS, Linux]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.10.11, 3.11.5]
- ZBBrain-Write Version: [e.g. 3.5.0]
- Playwright Version: [e.g. 1.40.0]

## 📝 Configuration
Please paste your `config.ini` with **sensitive values removed**:
```ini
[搜狗微信搜索]
搜狗微信搜索网址 = https://...
默认搜索关键词 = YOUR_KEYWORD

[智谱AI]
API Key = ***REMOVED***

# ... (other sections)
```

## 📜 Logs
Please paste relevant log output (remove sensitive information):
```
2026-03-15 13:00:00 - ZBBrainArticle - INFO - Starting...
...
```

## 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🤔 Possible Solution
If you have suggestions on a fix for the bug, please describe it here.
